## Task Description

Describe the task that needs to be completed.

## Purpose

Explain why this task is necessary for the project.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Task implemented
- [ ] Code compiles and runs locally
- [ ] No breaking changes introduced
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed

## Additional Notes

Add any relevant context or references here.
